caption: A video clip captures a political event featuring Narendra Modi, who is wearing a white kurta with a yellow and green stole. He stands before a backdrop of repeating lotus logos. Beside him, a group of women are seen wearing traditional attire and saffron-colored caps, some of whom are clapping. The scene is framed by orange graphics containing the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and "दिल्ली". At the bottom, a banner displays the text "लाइव देखें" along with social media handles "@BJP4India" and the websites "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Small text on the left reads "प्रजानेत्री". Across the frames, the composition remains static, but Narendra Modi is seen gesturing with his right hand raised while the women continue to cheer and clap, indicating an active, celebratory gathering.
